description_long: This is a modern, freestanding side-by-side refrigerator with a sleek, metallic silver finish. The front features two vertical doors, with the left door housing a built-in water and ice dispenser, complete with a small control panel and dispensing area. The sides and back are plain, with the back panel containing a rectangular black vent grille for airflow and cooling. The handles are long, vertical, and integrated into the door design, running nearly the full height of each door for easy access. The overall form is boxy and robust, with slightly rounded edges and reinforced corners. The refrigerator is designed for both residential and urban utility spaces, offering ample internal storage and a contemporary appearance.
description: A metallic silver, side-by-side refrigerator with integrated vertical handles and a front water/ice dispenser. The design is sleek and modern, with a prominent vent grille on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors, integrated handles, and a water/ice dispenser with a control panel on the left door.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth metallic surface with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large rectangular black vent grille on the lower left side of the back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain metallic surface and the profile of the integrated handles.
attribute_brand_logo: A small rectangular logo is visible above the water/ice dispenser on the left door, silver in color with dark text.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, integrated handles running nearly the full height of each door, flush with the door surface.
attribute_vent_or_grille_pattern: Rectangular black vent with horizontal slats located on the lower left of the back panel.
